query:
UPDATE subscribers
SET status = 'unsubscribed', unsubscribedAt = NOW()
WHERE email IN (
  'andrea.cinelli@foolfarm.com',
  'a.cinelli@foolfarm.com',
  'acinelli@foolfarm.com',
  'andreacinelli@foolfarm.com',
  'ceo@foolfarm.com',
  'ac@acinelli.com',
  'andrea@foolersclub.com',
  'admin@foolfarm.com',
  'jobs@foolfarm.com',
  'updates@foolfarm.com',
  'teamfoolcapital@foolfarm.com',
  'garage@foolfarm.com',
  'foolcapital@foolfarm.com'
)
AND status != 'unsubscribed';

SELECT email, status, unsubscribedAt
FROM subscribers
WHERE email IN (
